data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to manage its complex suite of applications, allowing for modular and scalable design.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe's infrastructure is heavily reliant on cloud services, providing flexibility and redundancy.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: To efficiently deliver content globally, Adobe uses a robust CDN.

data.title: Multi-Tier Security Architecture
data.description: The architecture involves layers of defense including firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and data encryption.

data.title: API-First Design
data.description: Adobe services are designed with an API-first approach to ensure seamless integration and interoperability.
